'''''Star Wars Weekly'' 95''' is the ninety-fifth issue in the ''[[Star Wars Weekly]]'' series of comic reprints, published on [[December 18]], [[1979]]. It included the original story "[[Chewbacca Fights Alone!]]" by [[Archie Goodwin]].

==Contents==
*"[[Chewbacca Fights Alone!]]"
*"Deathlok the Demolisher Part 7: New adventure!"
*"Guardians of the galaxy! Part 22: Fulfilled!"
*"Tales of the Watcher: One of our spacemen is missing!"
